title: DocumentsSchema
description: Per-document metadata + render bookkeeping. One row per renderable artifact (LLM conversation, Slack thread, Notion page, GitHub PR, …). Owns the document's identity (UUID + title + provenance) and the cache key (`row_set_hash` + `renderer_version`) used by incremental ingest to decide whether to re-emit the markdown file. `grid_rows.document_uuid` is the FK pointing here; many grid rows can share one document. See plan-ui-driven-sync.md, Phase C.

DocumentRow.description: One row in the `documents` table. Source of truth for `<root>/rendered_md/<...>.md` cache invalidation: ingest computes a fresh `row_set_hash` from the canonical grid_row tuples for this document and compares it to the stored value; on mismatch the renderer re-emits the file and bumps `rendered_at`. A bump to `renderer_version` invalidates every cache entry at once.

document_uuid.description: Stable document identifier. For providers whose native id is already a UUID (Anthropic conversation_uuid, Notion page_id) we reuse it verbatim; for ts-keyed providers (Slack threads) we synthesize a UUIDv5 from the same canonical tuple `grid_rows.uuid` uses. Must be deterministic so re-ingest is idempotent.

source_name.description: `sources[].name` from `config.yaml` that produced this document. Lets the sync UI show per-source delta counts and the worker scope re-renders to a single source.

provider.description: Denormalized provider tag, matches `grid_rows.provider` for the rows that point at this document. Stored here so the documents table is queryable without a join when filtering the sync page.

kind.description: Document-level category. Distinct from `grid_rows.kind` (which is per-row); this is the shape of the rendered markdown file.

title.description: Human-readable title — same value the renderer puts in the markdown frontmatter / page header. Nullable for sources whose entities don't have an authored title (e.g. early Slack threads); the renderer falls back to a snippet of the first message.

created_at.description: Earliest authored timestamp for content in this document (ISO-8601 with explicit offset, per AGENTS.md). Sourced from the underlying provider — not when we ingested it.

updated_at.description: Latest authored timestamp for content in this document (ISO-8601 with explicit offset). Drives the sync page's `Last updated` column.

md_path.description: Path to the rendered markdown file, relative to `<root>/rendered_md/`. NULL until the renderer has produced output. The backend's `/api/chat/{uuid}` endpoint resolves this column to find the file to serve.

row_set_hash.description: SHA-256 (hex) over the canonical tuple list of grid_rows that feed this document — message texts, authors, timestamps, attachments. Computed by ingest; if it matches the stored value and `renderer_version` is unchanged, the renderer skips this document. The canonical tuple definition is part of the renderer contract; bump `renderer_version` if you change it.

renderer_version.description: Opaque version string for the renderer that produced `md_path`. Bumping this value (typically when the markdown layout or templating changes) invalidates every documents row's cache and forces a global re-render on the next ingest.

rendered_at.description: When `md_path` was last written (ISO-8601 with explicit local offset, per AGENTS.md). NULL before the first render.
